title: Fetch, Response Admission, Abort Signals, Time Budgets, and Error Causes
description: The client calls fetch globally, assumes only rejection means failure, parses every status as Pokemon, creates timeout controllers that outlive requests, and loses abort causes. Learners cumulatively produce injected bounded abort-aware Fetch client through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Inject a narrow fetch-compatible port and keep Request, Response, and validation policy separate from domain commands.
Classify ok, not found, other 4xx, 5xx, redirects, media type, and unexpected response before parsing domain JSON.
Compose caller cancellation with bounded timeout using AbortSignal APIs and preserve the first meaningful reason.
